expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: with_stream method sets headers at lines 125-127, live_action sets at lines 65-67

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: with_stream method (line 129) uses response.headers['rack.hijack'] = proc do |stream|

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: Controller only includes ActionController::API (line 4), not ActionController::Live. live_action references undefined 'stream' variable - never gets stream from response.stream

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
expectations.evidence: with_stream handles IOError at line 133, live_action at line 112

expectations.text: Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: with_stream ensure block at line 139, live_action ensure block at line 116

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
expectations.evidence: EventEncoder instantiated in with_stream_action (line 6) and live_action (line 69), used to encode all events

expectations.text: The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: with_stream_action streams RunStartedEvent (line 12-16), TextMessageStart/Content/EndEvent, RunFinishedEvent (line 40-46). live_action streams same events at lines 75-79, 83-101, 103-109
